examples: Creatine is marketed as a nutritional supplement.
Creatine should be taken with a simple carbohydrate.
This is to cause an insulin spike and allow greater absorption of the creatine.
Vegan athletes tend to have lower creatine stores than athletes who eat meat.
Creatine has become popular among athletes tempted by claims that it can increase power without the side-effects associated with anobolic steroids.
